name: Stream-Mapparr
description: Automatically add matching streams to channels based on name similarity and quality precedence. Supports unlimited stream matching, channel visibility management, and CSV export cleanup.
author: PiratesIRC
_fields_note: Settings fields are defined dynamically by the Plugin.fields property in plugin.py (the single source of truth — it builds live dropdowns for channel profiles, groups, stream groups, M3U sources, and the channel database, and stays in sync with the code). Dispatcharr only falls back to a manifest 'fields' array when the plugin provides none, so it is intentionally left empty here to prevent drift (the previous static copy had gone stale).

actions.label: ✅ Validate Settings
actions.description: Check database connectivity, profiles, groups, and channel databases.

actions.label: 📅 Update Schedule
actions.description: Save settings and restart the background scheduler.

actions.label: 📥 Load/Process Channels
actions.description: Load channel and stream data from the database.

actions.label: 📊 Preview Changes
actions.description: Generate a CSV preview without making changes.

actions.label: ▶️ Match & Assign Streams
actions.description: Match and assign streams to channels.

confirm.message: This will modify channel-stream assignments based on the current settings. Continue?

actions.label: 📺 Match US OTA Only
actions.description: Match US OTA channels by callsign.

confirm.message: This will modify channel-stream assignments for US OTA channels. Continue?

actions.label: ↕️ Sort Alternate Streams
actions.description: Sort existing alternate streams by quality.

confirm.message: This will reorder alternate streams on matched channels. Continue?

actions.label: 🚀 Probe Stream Throughput
actions.description: Measure sustained throughput for streams currently assigned to channels in the selected profile. Updates the throughput cache used by alternate-stream sorting.

confirm.message: This will open short HTTP connections to streams currently assigned to channels in the selected profile (one at a time per M3U account). Continue?

actions.label: 👁️ Manage Channel Visibility
actions.description: Enable or disable channels based on stream count.

confirm.message: This will enable or disable channels based on the current settings. Continue?

actions.label: 🗑️ Clear CSV Exports
actions.description: Delete all CSV export files created by this plugin.

confirm.message: This will delete all CSV files in /data/exports/. This action cannot be undone. Continue?

actions.label: 🔓 Clear Operation Lock
actions.description: Manually clear a stuck operation lock.

confirm.message: Only clear the lock if you are sure no operation is currently running. Continue?
